models.hgctm: Sparse M7b with fixed training-only LDA warm start.
models.context_only_dm: Lithology- and age-conditioned DM without topics.

predictive_scoring: All predictive models use the same complete held-out Dirichlet-Multinomial likelihood.

nested_k_audit.interpretation: Training-only LDA audit, not full nested HGCTM selection.

limitation: Post-selection geographic sensitivity analysis; not untouched external model selection.
